title: Rare and Aerated Scottish Natto Terracotta Trifle
description: A Scottish weeknight dish featuring aerated natto, mushrooms, and a hint of mustard. Serve in a terracotta dish for a unique and rustic presentation.
instructions: Combine natto, mushroom duxelles, and miso paste in a bowl and mix until well combined.
Add the mustard, maple syrup, and rice vinegar to the bowl and mix until smooth.
Transfer the mixture to the terracotta trifle dish and smooth the top.
Mushrooms: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat and saut2e the mushrooms until tender.
Add the saut2ed mushrooms on top of the natto mixture.
Parsley: Finely chop the parsley and sprinkle on top of the natto mixture.
Mushimono-steaming: Place the trifle dish in the center of the mushimono steamer, add water to the steamer, and steam for 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
